title: KILL Mobs on look
description: When you look at mobs they DIE!
body:
When you look at mobs they DIE!!

![Dead Zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/582bf721f9b52241e3a28982847b23064c019ca7_0.webp)

Also there is Configurable gamerules

/gamerule deathOnLook true/false – toggles the mod on or off.

/gamerule deathOnLookRange 1-200 - Change the kill range, the default is 30 blocks.


 
My CurseForge Page: curseforge.com/members/saodcf/projects
